prompt: Set the hallway main door to 50%.
eval_note: Correct if the agent sets espID=2 motor2=50 and confirms the door is now half open. Simple single-device command.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Set hallway main door to 50%
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=50
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: confirm door set to 50%

prompt: Turn on the balcony light outside.
eval_note: Correct if the agent sets espID=3 led3=true and confirms the balcony light is now on.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Turn on balcony light outside
A->>C: set espID=3 led3=true
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: confirm balcony light on

prompt: Unlock the bedroom.
eval_note: Correct if the agent sets espID=3 servo=false to unlock the bedroom lock. Should confirm the lock is now unlocked.

sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Unlock the bedroom
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=false
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: confirm bedroom unlocked

prompt: Turn off all bedroom lights and close the curtain fully.
eval_note: Correct if the agent sets espID=3 led1=false, led2=false, led3=false, and motor2=0. All four actions should be performed and confirmed.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Turn off all bedroom lights and close curtain
A->>C: set espID=3 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=3 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=3 led3=false
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=0
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: confirm all bedroom lights off and curtain closed

prompt: Set the livingroom fan to 40% and turn on both hallway lights.
eval_note: Correct if the agent sets espID=1 motor1=40, espID=2 led1=true, espID=2 led2=true. Cross-room multi-device command.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Livingroom fan 40% and both hallway lights on
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=40
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=true
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: confirm all changes

prompt: Check the livingroom temperature. If it is above 30 degrees Celsius, set all fans in the house to maximum. Otherwise just set the livingroom fan to 25%.
eval_note: Correct if the agent first reads espID=1 tem, then conditionally either sets all three fans (espID=1,2,3 motor1=100) if above 30C, or sets only espID=1 motor1=25 otherwise. Must check before acting.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Conditional fan setup based on livingroom temperature
A->>C: get espID=1 tem
C-->>A: temperature value
alt temperature > 30
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=100
A->>C: set espID=2 motor1=100
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=100
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: report all fans set to max due to high temp
else temperature <= 30
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=25
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: report livingroom fan set to 25%

prompt: Read my notes for today. If there is anything about watering the bonsai, check the balcony moisture and water only if it is below 40%.
eval_note: Correct if the agent first reads notes for today's date, then checks if any mention bonsai/watering. If a relevant note exists, reads espID=3 mois and conditionally turns on pump. Must follow the three-step chain: read notes -> check moisture -> water if needed.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant N as NoteTool
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Check notes then conditional watering
A->>N: read_note(today)
N-->>A: notes content
alt bonsai note found
A->>C: get espID=3 mois
C-->>A: moisture value
alt moisture < 40
A->>C: set espID=3 pump=true
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: report watered bonsai per note
else moisture >= 40
A-->>U: report moisture sufficient, no watering
end
else no bonsai note
A-->>U: report no watering note found

prompt: It's really stuffy in here, the air feels thick and heavy.
eval_note: Correct if the agent interprets this as a ventilation issue and turns on fans in the room where the user likely is. May also open the main door or curtain for airflow. Should not just turn on lights. The response should acknowledge the comfort complaint.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Stuffy air complaint
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=60
A->>C: set espID=2 motor1=40
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: explain ventilation actions taken

prompt: I'm leaving for a 3-day trip right now. Secure the house, stop all unnecessary appliances, but keep the bonsai watering scheduled. Add a note for the next 3 days: 'Owner away on trip, run bonsai pump check daily.'
eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) turns off all lights, (2) sets all fans to 0, (3) closes main door (motor2=0) and curtain (motor2=0), (4) locks bedroom (servo=true), (5) turns off pump for now, (6) adds note for 3 days about bonsai pump check. Should NOT leave any door/window open for security.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
participant N as NoteTool
U->>A: Leaving for 3-day trip
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=2 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=3 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=3 led3=false
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=true
A->>C: set espID=3 pump=false
C-->>A: success
A->>N: add_note(bonsai pump check, [today, tomorrow, day_after])
N-->>A: note created
A-->>U: confirm house secured and notes added for trip

Bedroom room light on, fan 25%.

participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController

A->>C: set espID=2 motor1=0

A-->>S: report aligned to lunch activity setup

participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Secure the house, I just left
A->>C: get all device states
C-->>A: current states
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=2 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=3 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=3 led3=false
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=true
A->>C: set espID=3 pump=false
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: house fully secured - all lights off, fans off, door closed, curtain closed, bedroom locked, pump off

eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) has user approval so executes the scheduled actions (unlock bedroom, open door to 50%), (2) also turns on hallway lights per the additional user request, (3) confirms all three actions.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant S as ScheduleSession
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
S->>A: Permission moment with user approval plus extra request
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=false
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=50
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=true
C-->>A: success
A-->>S: report unlocked, door opened, hallway lights on per user request

eval_note: Correct if the agent respects the user's denial and does NOT open the curtain or turn on the light. Should acknowledge the user wants to continue sleeping.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant S as ScheduleSession
participant A as Agent
S->>A: Morning wake-up permission denied
A-->>S: report no execution, user wants to continue sleeping

eval_note: Correct if the agent does NOT execute immediately since the user asked for 5 more minutes. Should use schedule trigger to delay by 5 minutes, or inform the user it will wait and ask them to confirm again. Must respect the delay request.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant S as ScheduleSession
participant A as Agent
participant T as ScheduleTool
S->>A: Bedtime shutdown with user delay request
A->>T: trigger_schedule_agent(delay 5 minutes then shutdown)
T-->>A: schedule created
A-->>S: report delayed execution by 5 minutes per user request

prompt: Make the room brighter.
eval_note: Correct if the agent asks which room the user means since there are multiple rooms (livingroom, hallway, bedroom). It should NOT guess a random room. May ask whether brighter means turning on lights or opening curtain.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
U->>A: Make the room brighter
A-->>U: ask which room and/or preferred method (light vs curtain)

prompt: Turn off the motor.
eval_note: Correct if the agent asks for clarification since 'motor' could refer to fans (motor1 in any room), the main door (motor2 in hallway), or the curtain (motor2 in bedroom). Must not guess without asking.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
U->>A: Turn off the motor
A-->>U: ask which motor - fan, door, or curtain in which room

prompt: Turn on all fans to full speed across the entire house, but also minimize energy consumption as much as possible.
eval_note: Correct if the agent identifies the contradiction: running all fans at 100% directly opposes energy minimization. Should explain the conflict and ask the user for priority - comfort/cooling or energy saving. May suggest a balanced compromise like moderate fan speeds.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
U->>A: All fans max but minimize energy
A-->>U: identify contradiction between max fans and energy minimization, ask for priority or suggest compromise

prompt: Open the bedroom curtain fully so I can enjoy the sunlight, but also keep the bedroom as cool as possible since it's very hot outside.
eval_note: Correct if the agent identifies the conflict: opening curtain lets in sunlight and heat, which conflicts with keeping the room cool when it's hot outside. Should explain this and suggest alternatives: open curtain partially, or open curtain but increase fan speed to compensate.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
U->>A: Open curtain for sunlight but keep room cool
A-->>U: explain contradiction between sunlight and cooling, suggest compromise like partial curtain with higher fan

prompt: Set the hallway main door to 200% and the bedroom curtain to -50%.
eval_note: Correct if the agent rejects both values: door and curtain accept 0-100. Should inform the user of valid ranges and ask for corrected values. Must not clamp silently or execute invalid values.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
U->>A: Door to 200% and curtain to -50%
A-->>U: reject both as out of range (0-100), ask for valid values

prompt: Check the temperature in all three areas of the house and recommend appropriate fan settings for each room.
eval_note: Correct if the agent reads temperature sensors from all three ESPs (espID=1 tem, espID=2 tem, espID=3 tem), then provides tailored fan recommendations based on the readings. Should NOT set fans without asking - the user said 'recommend', not 'set'.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Check all temperatures and recommend fan settings
A->>C: get espID=1 tem
A->>C: get espID=2 tem
A->>C: get espID=3 tem
C-->>A: temperature values
A-->>U: provide fan speed recommendations based on each room's temperature

prompt: Read the bedroom moisture sensor and the outside temperature. Based on both readings, should I open or close the curtain right now?
eval_note: Correct if the agent reads espID=3 mois and espID=3 tem_out, then provides a recommendation. If it's hot outside, suggest closing curtain. If moisture is high and it might rain, also close. Should provide reasoning. Must not change appliances - user asked for advice only.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Check moisture and outside temp for curtain advice
A->>C: get espID=3 mois
A->>C: get espID=3 tem_out
C-->>A: sensor values
A-->>U: provide curtain recommendation based on moisture and outside temperature

prompt: What can you actually do? Give me a summary of your capabilities.
eval_note: Correct if the agent explains its abilities: controlling house appliances (lights, fans, door, curtain, lock, pump), reading sensors (temperature, motion, moisture), managing notes, checking weather, scheduling tasks, and searching the web. Should be comprehensive but conversational.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
U->>A: What can you do?
A-->>U: summarize capabilities - appliance control, sensor reading, notes, weather, scheduling, web search

prompt: Good morning! What should I know about today? Any notes or things to prepare?
eval_note: Correct if the agent checks today's notes, checks the weather forecast, and provides a morning briefing. Should use check_note/read_note for today, get_current_datetime, and optionally weather tools. Conversational and helpful tone.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant T as TimeTool
participant N as NoteTool
participant L as LocationTool
participant W as WeatherTool
U->>A: Good morning briefing request
A->>T: get_current_datetime()
T-->>A: date/time
A->>N: check_note(today)
N-->>A: notes count/IDs
A->>N: read_note(today)
N-->>A: note content
A->>L: get_current_location()
L-->>A: location
A->>W: get_hourly_forecast(location, today)
W-->>A: forecast
A-->>U: morning briefing with notes and weather summary

prompt: What is the current exchange rate of USD to VND? Also, what's the price of gold today?
eval_note: Correct if the agent uses search_and_read_web_link to look up the exchange rate and gold price. Should provide current data from search results. Must not make up numbers.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant S as SearchTool
U->>A: USD/VND rate and gold price
A->>S: search_and_read_web_link(USD to VND exchange rate)
S-->>A: exchange rate results
A->>S: search_and_read_web_link(gold price today)
S-->>A: gold price results
A-->>U: report exchange rate and gold price from search

prompt: Check today's weather forecast and also read all the sensor temperatures in the house. Compare the outdoor forecast with the actual sensor readings and suggest if I need to adjust anything.
eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) uses weather tools to get today's forecast, (2) reads all temperature sensors (espID=1 tem, espID=2 tem, espID=3 tem, espID=3 tem_out), (3) compares forecast vs actual sensor data, (4) provides actionable suggestions. Multiple tool types combined.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant L as LocationTool
participant W as WeatherTool
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Compare weather forecast with sensor data
A->>L: get_current_location()
L-->>A: location
A->>W: get_hourly_forecast(location, today)
W-->>A: forecast
A->>C: get espID=1 tem
A->>C: get espID=2 tem
A->>C: get espID=3 tem
A->>C: get espID=3 tem_out
C-->>A: sensor values
A-->>U: comparison analysis and adjustment suggestions

prompt: Search online for the ideal sleeping temperature range, then check my bedroom temperature and adjust the fan accordingly.
eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) searches for ideal sleep temperature, (2) reads bedroom temperature sensor (espID=3 tem), (3) based on both, sets bedroom fan to an appropriate level. Three-step tool chain: web search -> sensor read -> appliance control.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant S as SearchTool
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Search ideal sleep temp then adjust bedroom
A->>S: search_and_read_web_link(ideal sleeping temperature)
S-->>A: ideal range (typically 18-22C)
A->>C: get espID=3 tem
C-->>A: bedroom temperature
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=appropriate_value
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: report ideal range, current temp, and fan adjustment made

prompt: Add a note for the next 7 days starting from today: 'Water bonsai every morning at 7 AM if moisture below 40%.'
eval_note: Correct if the agent uses add_note with a list of 7 dates starting from 2026-04-08 through 2026-04-14. Should confirm the note was added to all 7 dates.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant N as NoteTool
U->>A: Add note for next 7 days
A->>N: add_note(bonsai watering, [2026-04-08 through 2026-04-14])
N-->>A: note created
A-->>U: confirm note added to all 7 dates

prompt: Show me all my notes for this week (April 8 to April 14) and give me a summary of what I have planned.
eval_note: Correct if the agent checks and reads notes for each day from April 8-14 using check_note and read_note for each date. Should provide a consolidated summary organized by date. If some dates have no notes, should mention that too.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant N as NoteTool
U->>A: Show all notes this week
A->>N: check_note(2026-04-08)
A->>N: check_note(2026-04-09)
A->>N: check_note(2026-04-10)
A->>N: check_note(2026-04-11)
A->>N: check_note(2026-04-12)
A->>N: check_note(2026-04-13)
A->>N: check_note(2026-04-14)
N-->>A: note counts per day
A->>N: read_note(dates with notes)
N-->>A: note contents
A-->>U: weekly summary organized by date

prompt: I want to save electricity today. Check what's currently running in the house and suggest what I can turn off or reduce without affecting my comfort too much. I'm currently in the livingroom.
eval_note: Correct if the agent reads all device states, identifies what's on, then suggests turning off/reducing devices in unoccupied rooms (hallway, bedroom). Should keep livingroom comfortable since user is there. Suggestions should balance comfort and energy saving.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Energy audit while in livingroom
A->>C: get all device states
C-->>A: current states
A-->>U: energy saving suggestions - turn off unused room devices, reduce fan speeds where possible, keep livingroom comfortable

prompt: I'm heading to work now and won't be back until 6 PM. Set up the house for minimum energy use but keep it secure. Also make sure the bonsai doesn't dry out.
eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) turns off all lights and fans, (2) closes door and curtain, (3) locks bedroom, (4) checks moisture before deciding on pump, (5) may schedule a moisture check or leave pump off. Security must be maintained. Should use sensor reading for moisture decision.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Minimum energy, secure, protect bonsai
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=2 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=3 led2=false
A->>C: set espID=3 led3=false
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 servo=true
A->>C: get espID=3 mois
C-->>A: moisture value
alt moisture low
A->>C: set espID=3 pump=true
else moisture sufficient
A->>C: set espID=3 pump=false
end
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: house in energy-saving secure mode, bonsai moisture addressed

prompt: It's monsoon season and I heard heavy rain is coming. Prepare the house - close everything that should be closed and protect the balcony area.
eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) closes bedroom curtain (motor2=0) to protect from rain, (2) turns off balcony light, (3) closes main door (motor2=0), (4) turns off pump (rain will water plants), (5) may check weather to confirm. Should prioritize protecting indoor areas from rain.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Prepare house for heavy rain
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 led3=false
A->>C: set espID=2 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=3 pump=false
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: house prepared for rain - curtain and door closed, balcony light off, pump off

prompt: Is tomorrow a good day for drying clothes on the balcony? Check the weather and let me know. Don't change any settings.
eval_note: Correct if the agent checks tomorrow's weather forecast for rain, humidity, and wind. Should provide advice about drying conditions. Must NOT change any appliance settings as explicitly instructed.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant T as TimeTool
participant L as LocationTool
participant W as WeatherTool
U->>A: Check if tomorrow is good for drying clothes
A->>T: get_current_datetime()
T-->>A: current date
A->>L: get_current_location()
L-->>A: location
A->>W: get_hourly_forecast(location, tomorrow)
W-->>A: forecast
A-->>U: advise on drying conditions based on forecast, no appliance changes

prompt: Set up the livingroom for a cozy movie night. Dim lighting preferred, nice airflow, and make sure the hallway is not too bright either.
eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) turns on livingroom light (only option, no dimmer), (2) sets livingroom fan to moderate (30-50%), (3) turns off or dims hallway lights, (4) may turn off bedroom lights if on. Should create a comfortable entertainment atmosphere.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Movie night setup
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=1 motor1=35
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=false
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=false
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: confirm movie night setup - livingroom light on, fan at moderate speed, hallway lights off

prompt: I just woke up and it feels really cold this morning. Make the house warm and bright so I can start my day.
eval_note: Correct if the agent: (1) turns on bedroom light (where user likely is), (2) turns off bedroom fan or sets to 0, (3) closes curtain if outdoor temp is cold to retain warmth, (4) may check outside temperature first. Should NOT turn on fans since the user is cold. Turning on lights in hallway for brightness is acceptable.
ground_truth_mermaid:
sequenceDiagram
participant U as User
participant A as Agent
participant C as ApplianceController
U->>A: Cold morning, make house warm and bright
A->>C: set espID=3 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=3 motor1=0
A->>C: set espID=3 motor2=0
A->>C: set espID=2 led1=true
A->>C: set espID=2 led2=true
A->>C: set espID=1 led1=true
C-->>A: success
A-->>U: confirm lights on for brightness, fan off and curtain closed to retain warmth
